titleEn: Asa Contracts Disease in His Feet
descriptionEn: Asa, the 3rd king of Judah (southern kingdom) reigns 41 years and is a good king. In his later years he develops some sort of disease in his feet and he apparently lets his son Jehoshaphat act as coregent.

verses.line: The rest of all the acts of Asa, and all his might, and all that he did, and the cities which he built, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah? Nevertheless in the time of his old age he was diseased in his feet.

images.caption: Illustration of Asa destroying the idols and forbidding worship in local shrines by Petrus Comestor.
